results.title: HKSAR V. CHUNG KAI- LAM
results.representations: Present: Ms. Cecilia Ng, PP, of the Department of Justice, for HKSAR. Mr. Nelson Lam instructed by M/s Chan, Wong & Lam, assigned by the Director of Legal Aid, for the defendant. Offences: (1)  to (3)  Unlawful sexual intercourse with a girl under the age of 16 years（與年齡在16歲以下的女童非法性交）
